T001.description: Add PVC=false to default .env and PVC=true .env population logic
T001.result_summary: Added PVC=false to default .env, PVC reading from existing .env, PVC=true population logic, and k8s template rendering

T002.result_summary: Created pvc.tmpl.yaml with PVC_NAME, PVC_SIZE, PVC_ACCESS_MODE, PVC_STORAGE_CLASS variables

T003.result_summary: deploy.tmpl.yaml already has VOLUME_MOUNTS/VOLUMES placeholders; init.sh rendering logic handles substitution

T004.description: Extend init.sh PVC preservation for all PVC vars
T004.result_summary: Extended PVC preservation: PVC_SIZE, PVC_ACCESS_MODE, PVC_STORAGE_CLASS now read from existing .env and populated when PVC=true

T005.description: PVC toggle true to false warning and --force flag
T005.result_summary: Implemented PVC toggle true→false warning with --force flag suppression

T006.result_summary: E2E test passed: PVC=false by default, PVC=true generates full stack (env vars + pvc.yaml + volumeMounts/volumes), PVC toggle leaves manifests intact
